products.product_name: Exclusive NEOSTRATA Anti-Aging Firming Duo
products.description: This anti aging neck cream is formulated with three clinically proven matrix building ingredients, each with a unique action to deliver optimal lifting and firming. ProAmino Acid helps stimulate procollagen production in the skin’s deep layers, while NeoCitriate™ helps promote new collagen and NeoGlucosamine® builds the surrounding support matrix. This trio of state-of-the-art actives works together to plump, build volume and firm sagging skin. NeoGlucosamine® is also a gentle exfoliant that helps reduce the appearance of uneven pigment and age spots that often appear in the décolletage. This potent cream is fortified with Apple Stem Cell Extract to help protect the longevity of skin’s essential cells, helping your skin to behave like younger skin. "Volumizes the look of slack skin with AMINOFIL® Amino acid derivative concentrated to target skin’s hydrating matrix for a more lifted appearance. Renews Tone with Gluconolactone A Polyhydroxy Acid & antioxidant chelator that helps to gently exfoliate and promote a more even skin tone. Smooths Skin with LMW Hyaluronic Acid Due to its unique small size, LMW (Low Molecular Weight) Hyaluronic Acid penetrates skin’s surface to attract moisture, providing hydration to visibly improve skin’s texture."
ingredients: malus domestica fruit cell culture extract
products.how_to_use:
Gently smooth over neck and décolletage twice daily.
Apply 3-5 drops to the face after cleansing (morning and evening). Follow with a NEOSTRATA® moisturizer.

products.product_name: PMD Clean (1 piece)
products.description: Give yourself a mini facial with help from PMD's Clean. Chic and portable, this skin care device features SonicGlow™ technology with over 7,000 vibrations per minute that deeply cleanses, tones and lifts for a more youthful-looking complexion. Key Benefits: With 7,000 vibrations per minute, Clean deeply removes the skin’s impurities by breaking down dirt and oil from within the pores. Using ultra-hygienic silicone, Clean is odor-resistant, antibacterial, hypoallergenic and waterproof. This hassle-free brush head never needs replacing. A powerful cleansing device with bristles gentle enough for all skin types. With four customizable modes, Clean provides a full spectrum of cleansing options. Supercharge your skin care regimen by using their SonicGlow™ technology to massage serums and moisturizer into skin for a more youthful look. PMD recommends using mode 3 or 4 for massaging. Apply skincare products and use back side of the Clean to gently massage. Serum will be more effective and absorb deeper into the skin.
products.how_to_use: Step 1: Rinse and Apply Cleanser. Rinse face with warm water and gently rub in cleanser. Step 2: Wet and Power on Device. Rinse Clean under water and power on device. We recommend modes 1 and 2 for optimum cleansing results. Step 3: Smart Cleansing. Move brush head in circular motions, cleansing entire face. It is safe to spend more time in areas that may be of a personal concern. Step 4: Rinse and Pat Dry. Rinse face and Clean of any excess cleanser then pat dry.

products.product_name: NEOM Focus the Mind Essential Oil Blend 0.3 fl. oz
products.description: Bringing you back to the present moment in a snap, the Focus the Mind Essential Oil Blend from natural wellbeing brand NEOM zaps you with an energising aroma that promotes razor-sharp attention. It stimulates your senses with a complex blend of 100% natural essential oils from Pine, Cedarwood and Eucalyptus, a trio expertly curated to boost mental clarity and enhance concentration. Compatible with your NEOM Wellbeing Pod, the fragrant oil imbues your personal interior spaces with layers of Green Hibiscus notes mingled with deeper, woody undertones that create a balsamic effect. You can even add a few drops to a hot bath or use it for an oil massage to get your mind and body feeling active and in the zone. Made with 100% natural essential oils. Please note: This bottle contains up to 30 uses, with 5-10 drops per use.
products.how_to_use:
To experience the full Feel Good Vibes Essential Oil Blend experience, use in your Wellbeing Pod. Fill the water tank of the Wellbeing Pod with cold water. Do not exceed the maximum water level line
Add up to 10 drops of the Feel Good Vibes Essential Oil Blend.
With the touch of a button, it will instantly release a heatless, fine mist of aromatheraphy oil blend for stress, in a scented vapour into the atmosphere, to stimulate your senses and help boost your wellbeing
Alternatively you can also add 5 drops to a warm bath, or 1 to 2 drops to your chosen base oil for a calming and relaxing massage

products.product_name: Briogeo Curl Charisma™ Rice Amino + Avocado Hydrating Shampoo 8 oz
products.description: Briogeo's Curl Charisma™ Rice Amino + Avocado Hydrating Shampoo gives waves, curls, and coils the gentle and nourishing care it needs. This creamy, sulfate-free shampoo-hydrates and cleanses without stripping hair of natural oils and minimizes frizz to enhance definition. Rice amino acids help seal the hair cuticle and lockout frizz-causing humidity while tomato fruit ferment enhances moisture retention to support uniform curl formation. Key Ingredients: Rice Amino Acids: smooth down and help control frizz Shea Butter: deeply hydrates and retains moisture in hair Vitamin E: protects hair from free-radical damage Tomato Fruit Ferment Extract: helps encourage curl formation Key Benefits: Cleanses and hydrates waves, curls, and coils Creamy, sulfate-free formula Combats frizz Enhances moisture retention
products.how_to_use: Apply to wet hair and massage from root to tip, then rinse. For best results, follow up with Briogeo™ Curl Charisma™ Rice Amino + Shea Curl Defining Conditioner.

products.product_name: Dermalogica Retinol Renewal Gift Set ($186 Value)
products.description: Renew skin with a transformative duo that transcends the ordinary. Dynamic Skin Retinol Serum visibly reduces the 4 signs of skin aging in just 2 weeks,* and Super Rich Repair helps replenish skin's natural moisture levels to nourish and defend against environmental assaults. *Clinical results on reduced appearance of wrinkles, pores, dark spots, and uneven texture after 2 weeks with Dynamic Skin Retinol Serum. Independent clinical test, 59 subjects, 8 weeks. Products Included: Dermalogica Dynamic Skin Retinol Serum (0.34 fl. Oz) Dermalogica Super Rich Repair (1.7 fl. Oz)
ingredients:
phenoxyethanol.
dynamic skin retinol serum: water/aqua/eau
products.how_to_use:
Super Rich Repair: Apply to face and neck with light, upward strokes. Wait for cream to absorb before applying additional products. Use twice daily. Store at room temperature.
Dynamic Skin Retinol Serum: After cleansing, apply a thin layer over face. Keep out of eyes. Use nightly. If dryness or redness occurs, reduce frequency. Wear an SPF during the day.

products.product_name: Miriam Quevedo Sublime Gold Shampoo 250ml
products.description: Exquisite ultra-nourishing and restorative shampoo that has rejuvenating properties and adds an exceptional shine to hair. Sublime formula powered by Bioactive 24k Gold, Wild Olive Tree Stem Cells and Vitamin D Nectar, which deeply nourishes without making the hair heavy and and helps to regenerate the heart of the hair fiber and scalp. It acts as a shield against the effects of aging and to protect the color, as well as infusing your hair with renewed youth. Key Benefits: Helps reduce hair aging at the cellular level Contributes to liberate hair and scalp of impurities and residues Its active ingredients intensely nourish, repair and regenerate the heart of the hair fiber and the scalp Its active ingredients strength the internal structure of the hair, repairing damage and broken links Has highly protective properties against aggressors such as harsh salon treatments, pollution, UV rays or oxidative stress Revitalizes the hair, infusing it with a renewed youth Provides sublime shine and luminosity with more intense reflections thanks to 24 k micronized gold Has moisturizing, anti irritant, and antioxidant properties Enhances the softness, silkiness and shine of the hair Vegan formula without SLES sulfates with multi benefit natural surfactants Minimizes color loss through successive washes helps retain more than 96 of color after 10 washes Mild, non aggressive with hair or scalp Provides a polishing effect by preventing peeling of the cuticle Respectfully sourced, sustainable and biodegradable Key Ingredients: Wild olive tree stem cells (proprietary), Vitamin D nectar, Vegan Shine Beautifier Complex (proprietary), Bioactive 24k gold, organic argan oil, vegal keratin, vegetal collagen, moringa peptide (proprietary), Multi-vitamin B complex, betaine amino acids, Five Trace Elements Protein Complex (proprietary), DNA Protein Repair Complex (proprietary)
ingredients: moringa oleifera seed extract/moringa pterygosperma seed extract
products.how_to_use: Apply to wet hair and scalp. Massage in gently to create a lather. Leave on for 2 to 5 minutes. Rinse thoroughly.

products.product_name: Christophe Robin Luscious Curl Cleansing Balm with Kokum Butter 250ml
products.description: Wash the day away with Christophe Robin’s Luscious Curl Cleansing Balm. Formulated for curly to coily hair types, this 2-in-1 formula cleanses, detangles, and nourishes curly to coily hair while helping to define and soften for curls with bounce and shine. Key Ingredients: Kokum Butter: conditions dry hair and scalp Creatine: strengthens hair to prevent breakage and damage Chia Seed Oil: adds softness Flaxseed Milk: helps define curls for touchable hold with bounce and shine Key Benefits: Cleanses, detangles and nourishes curly to coily hair Non-lathering, balmy texture Hydrates and defines curls Creates a frizz-free, shiny finish
products.how_to_use: Apply onto damp hair, working it from root to tip to cleanse and lather slightly. Then comb through the lengths to detangle before rinsing thoroughly. Follow with the Luscious Curl Defining Butter to define the curls. Avoid contact with eye area. If contact occurs, wash thoroughly with water.

products.product_name: R+Co TELEVISION Perfect Hair Shampoo 33.8 oz
products.description: Steal the show with TELEVISION Perfect Hair Shampoo from R+Co. Suitable for all hair types, this shampoo adds body and shine while strengthening and softening your tresses. Key Ingredients: Juniper Berry Extract: helps maintain the optimal oil balance of the scalp and adds weightless moisture to the hair Glycerin: helps maintain the moisture balance of hair Babassu Seed Oil: an excellent moisturizer that deep conditions dry hair and scalp Panthenol: penetrates hair and provides hydration Marigold Flower Extract: hydrates dry scalp and helps remove dandruff flakes Key Benefits: Good for anyone who wants all the qualities of beautiful, healthy, camera-ready hair Provides body and shine Softens, smooths, and strengthens the hair Infused with natural ingredients that promote an optimal scalp environment and helps hair retain moisture
products.how_to_use: Use after R+Co TELEVISION Perfect Hair Shampoo. Spread a quarter-sized amount through clean hair. Rinse.

products.product_name: Colorescience Total Lash Mascara 8ml
products.description: Total Lash™ Mascara immediately enhances the appearance of length and volume for a vibrant, eye-opening effect. With every application, this clinically proven formula works to improve lash health with a blend of peptides and botanicals that nourishes and helps support the natural lash cycle for healthier, stronger, fuller, and longer-looking lashes. Features & Benefits +Grow. Supports lash growth cycle to improve length, density, and overall health with continued use +Fortify. Strengthens with botanicals that condition and nourish to prevent brittleness & breakage +Enhance. Immediately enhances appearance of lift, length, and volume with rich black tubing of every lash, while separating for a fanned-out lash Conical brush tip allows for easy application to coat every lash from root to tip, including short inner and outer lashes Tubing mascara is easily and completely removed without aggressive scrubbing when using Colorescience Barrier Pro™ 1-Step Cleanser, or your favorite cleanser. Watch tubes effortlessly slide off the lashes. Non-irritating, all-in-one serum, conditioner, and mascara. Free of prostaglandin analogues, Fragrance-free. Dye-free. Contains beeswax. Clinically proven results. Dermatologist Tested. Ophthalmologist tested. Safe for: use around the eye area, sensitive eyes, and contact lens wearers. Why Total Lash™ Mascara The all-in-one Serum+ Conditioner + Mascara that is clinically proven to increase lash length, while nourishing, strengthening, and reducing breakage, and offering a buildable high impact look Fans of our multifunctional treatment-makeup-sunscreen hybrids like Face Shields SPF 50 and Total Eye® 3-in-1 Renewal Therapy SPF 35 can complete every look with a high-impact, good-for-you tubing mascara while also providing long-term improvement for their healthiest, rejuvenated lashes A gentle and effective option that is ideal for sensitive eyes, those looking to restore and repair lashes, especially after discontinuing lash extensions, false lashes, or other lash procedures Mascara that further enhances results for users who wish to continue using serums Key Ingredients: Peptides: Myristoyl Pentapeptide-17 stimulates proliferation of hair follicle cells promoting longer, thicker, and more flexible lashes Panthenol: Strengthening pro-vitamin B5 improves moisture retention and elasticity while thickening the hair Jojoba Seed Oil: Nourishing, nutrient dense emollient hydrator protects hair shaft Burdock Root Extract: Anti-inflammatory antioxidant that reduces dryness and improves resilience Acorus Calamus Root Extract: Botanical extract that is both anti-inflammatory and an antioxidant, and is nutrient rich for optimal root health Glycerin: Conditions skin and hair to promote healthy hair growth Iron Oxides: Mineral pigments that provide immediate long-wear, rich black color. Dye-free color is ideal for sensitive eyes. Copolymer: Extends wear by enhancing adherence and wearability
products.how_to_use:
AM Daily On clean, bare lashes, start by placing brush at the root of the lash and gently wiggle the brush side-to-side while swiping upwards toward the tips of lashes. Repeat throughout all lashes, including bottom lashes.
Be sure to get the inner and outer corner lashes. It may be helpful to use the tip of the brush to reach these lashes.
Wait several seconds after each coat before applying the next coat while lashes are still wet.

products.product_name: Doctor Rogers Night Repair Treatment 1 fl. oz
products.description: Stimulate skin renewal with our Night Repair Treatment. The proprietary formulation of acids, antioxidants, and bakuchiol reverses sun damage and builds collagen to fight fine lines and wrinkles. Well tolerated, even by sensitive skin.
products.how_to_use: At night, apply to bare face, neck, chest and back of hands. Follow with moisturizer.

products.product_name: R+Co BRIGHT SHADOWS Root Touch-Up Spray 1.5 oz
products.description: When grays or natural color start peeking through, touch it up with BRIGHT SHADOWS Root Touch-Up Spray from R+Co. This touch-up spray is designed to temporarily cover roots or unsightly gray hair until your next shampoo session and between salon visits. Pearl extract and biotin enhance a stronger and healthier head of hair. Key Ingredients: Pearl Extract: rich in minerals and amino acids, it helps to regenerate and moisturize hair and provides hair with shine Biotin: helps to thicken hair and stimulates hair growth and overall hair health Treated Pigment: provides multidimensional, temporary coverage and disguises gray roots Key Benefits: Covers grays and re-growth until next hair appointment Actuator ensures easy, mess-free application Enhances healthier-looking hair Paraben and sulfate-free; vegan
ingredients: ci 77163 r+co. bright shadows gray root cover up spray - dark brown

products.product_name: Moroccanoil Volumizing Mousse 8.5 oz
products.description: Moroccanoil Volumizing Mousse is a lightweight styling mousse that builds all-over body and flexible hold without stickiness. The formula is infused with antioxidant-rich argan oil and an anti-static agent for touchable, frizz-free results. Fragranced with the Moroccanoil signature scent, a blend of spicy amber and sweet floral notes. Polyquaternium-4: Weightless, flexible polymer that provides instant volume, maximum lift and a 'memory' factor, for hair that holds its shape and styles that last longer. Soytrimonium Chloride: Hair-conditioning and anti-static agent that adds slip and silkiness.
products.how_to_use: Shake can well. Invert can and apply a palm-sized amount of mousse on towel-dried hair, combing fingers through to distribute product evenly. Blow-dry with a round brush, starting at the root.

products.product_name: COOLA Clear Skin Oil-Free Moisturiser SPF 30 32ml
products.description: A silky sheer, oil-free moisturizer with SPF 30 specially formulated for sensitive and acne-prone skin. Provides calming, breakout-free protection. ingredients:
zinc oxide 14.7%
aloe barbadensis leaf juice

products.product_name: Supergoop! Daily Dose Bioretinol and Mineral SPF 40 1 fl. oz

Broad spectrum UV + environmental protectors defend skin from photodamage now, keeping it healthy and soft later.

products.description: Your effective dark spot fighter. products.product_name: By Terry Hyaluronic Lip Liner (Various Shades)
products.description: Care & Contour Lip Definer. Clean, vegan and up to 98% natural formula. A hydrating contour and care liner to sculpt and nourish lips all day long. To keep this pencil in optimal condition always close the cap.

products.product_name: SkinCeuticals Hydrating B5 Mask (2.5 fl. oz.)

Key Ingredients: Hyaluronic Acid: this natural humectant is capable of retaining 1,000 times its own weight in water, making it an effective moisturizer Vitamin B5: this vitamin is essential for skin repair function Advanced Moisture Complex: comprised of glycerin, urea, sodium PCA, trehalose and polyquaterium-51, this ingredient blend contains constituents of the skin’s natural moisturizing factor (NMF) and helps restore skin’s optimal moisture balance Key Benefits: High concentrations of hyaluronic acid and vitamin B5 to hydrate and restore skin Optimizes moisture infusion in targeted areas Leaves skin supple and smooth Ideal for all skin types Tip: Hydrating B5 Mask can also be used on other dry areas such as neck, chest, hands, knees, elbows, and feet.

products.product_name: Erborian Travel Size CC Cream 14g (Various Shades)
products.description: Erborian's high-tech low-maintenance CC Crème enhances your skin's natural complexion for a radiant finish. The CC Crème's initial white pigments transform to match your skin tone when blended into the skin for a seamless shade match and a more even-looking complexion that looks like you've applied a filter. If you're looking for a light coverage and radiant finish, the CC Crème is a makeup bag staple! For a flawless complexion, the CC Cream helps: Blur the appearance of pores and imperfections Even out your skin tone Enhance your skin's natural radiance Always formulated without: Parabens Sulfates Phtalates
products.how_to_use:
Apply a pea-sized amount of cream to face and blend CC Cream into skin using your fingertips and watch as it adjusts to your skintone.
Also makes an excellent makeup base.
Try this with Erborian's Glow Crème for a subtle glow.

products.product_name: Glytone Age Defying C+ Antioxidant Serum 1 fl. oz.
products.description: A concentrated serum formula featuring a proprietary Antioxidant Complex to help protect the skin and improve the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Vitamin E helps nourish skin and protect against free radicals while plant-based Squalane helps maintain the skin's moisture barrier and provides weightless hydration.

products.product_name: By Terry Ombre Blackstar Color-Fix Cream Shadow (1.64 g.)
products.description: Bestselling 3-in-1 creamy eyeshadow. Eyeliner, illuminator, and eyeshadow. Anti-ageing formula. Buildable coverage for both subtle and dramatic looks. Matte & Shimmer finish. Travel friendly. Glam up the eyes in an instant with the iconic Ombre Blackstar. This multi-purple pen acts as an eyeliner, illuminator, and eyeshadow all in one. Its unique formula is infused with multi-active Tahitian Black Pearl extracts and light-reflecting Tourmaline that help lift the eyelids, making them appear wider and brighter. The creamy, waterproof texture glides on effortlessly and is easy to layer and blend. Easy to blend and highly pigmented, this eyeshadow is designed in 12 vibrant shades for all makeup looks. Available in shimmer finish with 6 unique shades, and matte (NEW) with 6 intense colors: 100. Matte Bare 101.Matte Nude 102. Matte Latte 103. Matte Toffee 104. Matte Ash 105. Matte Mokka TECHNOLOGY Tahitian Black Pearls Extracts: Rich in fortifying calcium and anti-ageing proteins to care for your eyelids. These ingredients also help to create a creamy formula that glides effortlessly onto the lids, making it easy to apply and blend. Tourmaline: Offers light diffusing properties, anti-ageing properties and detoxification, whilst and enhancing the overall formula. Adhesive Polymers: Provide long-lasting, intense colour. RESULT This multi-purpose, creamy eyeshadow pen helps you master a variety of looks, from a quick and easy smokey eye to a more dramatic eyeshadow style. Flawless and radiant all day, no matter the conditions. Smooth application that blends effortlessly. Waterproof, intense colour. CONSUMER RESULTS TEXTURE 100%* agree the texture is soft and silky 100%* agree the texture does not dry out the eyelids 100%* agree the texture does not leave fallout APPLICATION 100%* agree it's an easy-to-blend formula 100%* agree it feels smooth and applies evenly 100%** agree the product does not crease 100%** agree the product is transfer-proof RESULTS OVER A 14-DAY PERIOD 100%** agree the product is long-lasting 100%** agree the product provides optimal coverage 100%** agree the eyelids appear smoothed and scuplted 100%** agree the gaze is luminous and perfected. 100%** agree the product is waterproof *Satisfaction test performed on 24 volunteers. **Satisfaction test performed on 24 volunteers over a 14-day period.
products.how_to_use:
EYESHADOW For a buildable wash of colour, apply Ombre Blackstar directly to eyes and then immediately blend with a fluffy eyeshadow brush or a finger until it's seamlessly blended.
Repeat until you get the desired intensity of colour. EYELINER For a thin liner effect, rub an eye liner brush into the formula and then apply along the lash line.
Alternatively, for a thicker liner look, apply Ombre Blackstar directly along the lash line. Leave for a defined look or use a small fluffy brush or a finger to diffuse the line for a softer effect. EYE PRIMER As a long wear formula, Ombre Blackstar is perfect to use as a base for eye makeup. Simple apply a sheer wash of Ombre Blackstar across the eye area, then apply your eyeliner or eyeshadow over the top.
This will add extra-long wear to your eye look and give the colours extra vibrancy.
Once dried Ombre Blackstar will stay in place, to remove use an oil-based cleanser.

products.product_name: One Love Organics Vitamin C Body Polish (6 oz.)
products.description: One Love Organics Vitamin C Body Polish exfoliates and hydrates the skin for a radiant all-over glow. Featuring antioxidant-rich vitamin C ester, aloe, shea butter and organic sugar crystals, this gentle formula sloughs away dead skin cells, improving tone and texture while soothing inflammation, for softer, smoother skin. Vitamin C ester - firms skin while protecting the skin from damaging free radicals Aloe - naturally soothes inflammation Shea butter - rich in vitamins A and E, it hydrates and calms irritated skin Raw organic sugar crystals - cleanse and exfoliate the skin, removing dead skin cells, dirt, oil and other impurities Due to a manufacturer packaging change, item received may vary from product image

products.product_name: Paula's Choice CLEAR Pore Normalizing Cleanser (6 fl. oz.)

Infused with salicylic acid and panthenol, this cleansing gel helps to reduce the appearance of blemishes by clearing away debris and bacteria. Key Ingredients: Salicylic Acid: dissolves oil and debris that can clog pores and lead to breakouts Key Benefits: Dissolves pore-clogging impurities Cleans without irritation Gel texture calms and refreshes skin Ideal for acne-prone and combination skin types Fragrance-free

products.product_name: Augustinus Bader The Serum 15ml
products.description: Formulated with clean super-hydrators and nature's most effective problem-solvers, this breakthrough serum zeros in on your skin's most persistent challenges. From dehydration, stress, and the signs of aging and environmental damage to the appearance of imperfections and loss of elasticity, The Serum delivers an effortless, all-encompassing solution. Backed by 30 years of visionary science. Powered by TFC8®. Key Ingredients: Augustinus Bader skincare is formulated with sustainably-sourced, high potency botanicals and bio-engineered clean actives, where possible, to reduce environmental impact. TFC8®: A complex of natural amino acids, high-grade vitamins and synthesized molecules naturally found in skin, which guides key nutrients and powerful natural ingredients to the skin cells, creating an optimal environment for the body's innate processes of repair and renewal. Vitamin C: A potent, antioxidant-packed boost for the skin. Stimulates the production of collagen for firmer, more resilient skin, while brightening and defending against stress caused by environmental aggressors. Polysaccharide Moisture Complex: A multi-tasking skincare technology for optimal moisture levels. Rehydrates from within while actively preventing water loss, for a complexion that is fresh, supple and soft. Squalane: A clean, plant-derived humectant. This intensely hydrating oil effectively attracts and retains moisture for supple, radiant skin with greater bounceback. Sodium Hyaluronate: A salt known to powerfully attract and retain moisture. Helps stimulate cellular cohesion, for youthful, healthy-looking skin that is firm and supple. Rehydrates at a deep level to plump up the skin and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Pomegranate Seed Concentrate: A sustainably sourced, antioxidant-rich extract packed with micronutrients and punicic and linolenic fatty acids. Supports skin's self-renewal mechanisms to soothe and balance stressed, overly reactive skin while reducing visible signs of aging, including wrinkles. Resveratrol: A natural polyphenol produced by some plants (and famously found in red wine) to defend against injury. Known to have antioxidant properties, offering powerful defense against external aggressors. Edelweiss Extract: A rare star-shaped plant that grows wild in Alpine mountain ranges. Known to lift, smooth and tighten sagging skin and wrinkles while offering serious protection against oxidative stresses such as pollution and UV radiation. Rice Bran Oil: A revered beauty secret for centuries, naturally derived and packed with antioxidant-rich ferulic acid. Known to help suppress the formation of fine lines and wrinkles, brown spots, and other visible signs of premature aging Key Benefits: Reduces and helps to prevent the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and hyperpigmentation for more youthful looking skin. Improves tone and smooths texture for brighter, more even looking skin. Boosts skin's natural radiance. Supports production of collagen and boosts elasticity for plumper, more resilient skin. Helps lift, smooth and tighten sagging skin, for a firmer, revitalized complexion. Nourishes and hydrates the skin, while preventing moisture loss (TEWL) for supple, refreshed skin with greater bounce-back Balances and calms stressed, overly reactive skin. Helps to reduce redness. Protects against environmental aggressors and oxidative stresses such as pollution and UV radiation.
products.how_to_use:
Use Daily. Recommended 2x a day - morning & evening
Apply on clean, dry skin. In upward, sweeping motions, smooth The Serum over the face, neck and décolleté until fully absorbed. Follow by applying your Augustinus Bader The Rich Cream or The Cream and/or The Face Oil.

Gluten-free, Nut-free, Vegan Key Benefits The skin is perfectly cleansed without feeling dehydrated The appearance of surface build-up and impurities are removed The complexion appears clear, smooth and bright Key Ingredients Stone Crop: hydrating and nourishing for uneven skin tones Chamomile: revitalizes, calms and balances the appearance of skin​ Shea Butter: calming and restorative agent

chlorella pyrenoidosa extract* and vegetable glycerin*]
products.how_to_use: Mix (dilute) a small amount of the product (pea size) with water in hands, apply and massage into skin with fingertips in a circular motion covering the face and neck for 1—3 minutes. Completely remove with a damp face cloth and then finish with an application of toner. As an eye makeup remover, gently use in a circular motion away from the eyes and rinse thoroughly with water.

products.product_name: iS Clinical Extreme Protect SPF 30 (3.5 oz.)

Olive leaf extract reduces redness and protects against sun damage.

products.product_name: dpHUE Blonding Brush
products.description: Create sunkissed highlights at-home to frame your face, lighten your tips and blend at your root. products.how_to_use: Works best on pre-lightened or natural blonde hair. Apply on damp or dry hair. Remove bottom safety cap. Hold applicator upright and click bo­ttom to bring product to brush. Hold strands between forefinger and thumb and pull away from face. Using brush tip, paint onto targeted areas. Repeat process as desired, using one click between applications. Product will activate when heated, by sun or hair dryer.

products.product_name: PCA SKIN CE Advanced with Hexylresorcinol and Silymarin (1 fl. oz.)

products.product_name: Rejuvi 'q' Flavonoid Complex (1 oz.)

products.product_name: RMS Beauty Hydra Setting Powder 10g (Various Shades)
products.description: A longwearing, talc-free, skincare-infused loose setting powder available in three sheer, soft-focus shades. On Dry Hair: For a more intensive detox, smooth generously through dry hair from root to tip, leave on for 15 minutes, and rinse thoroughly. Follow with the Purifying Shampoo with Thermal Mud for a deep cleanse, then the Purifying Conditioner Gelée with Sea Minerals to detangle if needed.

When to Use: 1-2 times per week.

Use on dry hair.
Section hair into 1" sections.
Ensure that the styler is as close to the root as possible before closing the plates.
Gently move toward the tip of the section in one simple gliding motion.
Repeat the process with each section of hair, gliding once from roots to ends.

Carefully apply GrandeLASH-MD once daily on a clean, dry upper lash line only using a single stroke on your eyelid just above your upper lash line (like a liquid eyeliner). Use one dip into the bottle for both upper lash lines and allow 2-3 minutes for the serum to fully dry before lying down or applying other products to your eye area. Use sparingly.
If serum gets into the eye, immediately rinse thoroughly with cool water to completely remove serum from the eye. Apply every day for a full 3 months. After desired improvement is achieved, apply every other day for maintenance. GrandeLASH-MD requires continued use to maintain benefits.
This cosmetic product contains (a small amount of) isopropyl cloprostenate, an analog of prostaglandin. It is important to use the product as instructed so that it does not get into the eye. As instructed in the directions for application, if product does come into contact with the eye, immediately rinse thoroughly with cool water to completely remove the cosmetic serum from the eye. If redness, irritation or other unwanted effects occur, stop using product immediately. If symptoms persist, seek medical attention.
GrandeBROW: As with all cosmetic products used in the area of the eye (or close proximity to the eye), it is important to carefully read all directions and warnings.
Carefully apply GrandeBROW once daily on a clean, dry brow to the natural shape of your brow, concentrating on sparse, thinning or over-plucked areas. Apply only with the product applicator provided. Allow 2-3 minutes for the serum to fully dry before applying other products to your brow or eye area. If serum gets into the eye, immediately rinse thoroughly with cool water to completely remove serum from the eye. Apply every day for a full 4 months.
After desired improvement is achieved, apply every other day for maintenance. GrandeBROW requires continued use to maintain benefits.
This cosmetic product contains (a small amount of) isopropyl cloprostenate, an analog of prostaglandin. It is important to use the product as instructed so that it does not get into the eye. products.how_to_use:
Apply to face, neck and décolleté. May be used day and night. Use the flat side of the baton to scoop out the product, warm up between fingers, then press into the skin.
Using the flat end, massage from the center of the forehead down to the brow, using quick rainbow-like motions towards the temple. Repeat on the other side.
Use the flat faceted side and gently sweep from the cheekbone outward to the jawline. Repeat on the other side.
Tap the flat end of the baton three times at these targeted points of the face: The center of the brows, outer corner of the eyes, under the eyes (on the orbital bone) under the nose, and at the center of the chin.

Serums, are considered to be the most important step in any skincare routine. Serums contain smaller molecules with higher concentrations of beneficial ingredients compared to regular moisturizers. Serums are intensively infused with higher concentrations of active ingredients that can penetrate deeper into the skin, delivering more targeted results. Serums fit perfectly into every skin care routine to provide you with the optimal results your skin needs, no matter your skin type! Did you know? Serums are also a great alternative for makeup primers! Use a serum to prime your skin before applying your skin makeup! Rehydrate fine lines, smooth over the appearance of pores and create a soft skin surface that is ready for makeup application. Klairs serum lotion for sensitive skin strives to provide you with a Rich Moist Soothing Serum that is most beneficial to you and your skin by providing a product that is: 1. No animal testing 2. Alcohol free 3. No paraben 4. No Artificial Coloring 5. Eco friendly

Formulated with an oil absorber which produces a matte and smooth facial appearance, so the product can also be used as a primer before using make up (makes make up more integrated and lasts up to 8 hours).
